name: Performance Optimization: Smoother Streaming + Lower Resource Usage
body:
## 🚀 Performance Optimization

Major performance improvements for smoother AI streaming output while keeping memory and CPU usage extremely low.

### Rendering Optimizations
- **Store layer**: `streamingMessage` separation for O(1) token updates (was O(n) array rebuild per token)
- **React.memo**: Historical messages are now frozen — only the last streaming message re-renders
- **Throttled Markdown parsing**: `useThrottledValue` hook limits rehype/remark parsing to ~12fps (80ms), reducing CPU by 80%+
- **O(1) step lookup**: `stepsByMessageId` Map replaces O(n×m) `steps.filter()` in render
- **Virtualization**: Messages >80 automatically enable `@tanstack/react-virtual` virtual scrolling (90% DOM reduction)

### Resource Usage Optimizations
- **Background throttling**: `backgroundThrottling: true` + `spellcheck: false` in Electron webPreferences
- **Window visibility throttling**: USB/network polling 10s→60s, scheduler 30s→120s when window hidden to tray
- **GPU composite optimization**: Removed `backdrop-blur-md` from 4 sticky banners to eliminate scroll-time repaints

### Expected Improvements
| Metric | Before | After | Improvement |
|--------|--------|-------|-------------|
| Streaming token update | O(n) | O(1) | ~100x |
| Re-rendered components | All messages | Last 1 only | ~Nx |
| Markdown parsing | Per-token | ~12fps | 80% ↓ |
| Long session DOM | 100+ nodes | ~10 visible | 90% ↓ |
| Background CPU | 10s polling | 60-120s | 85% ↓ |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/xxccdl/Xcomputer/compare/v0.2.55...v0.2.56
